0.description: Source inaccessible or unusable; no reproducible retrieval path. Hard drop if ever scored.
0.label: proposed, not yet applied

1.description: Marginal accessibility; manual-only, unstable, or non-reproducible access. Hard drop if ever scored.
1.label: proposed, not yet applied

2.description: Limited accessibility; significant barriers to systematic retrieval. Hard drop if ever scored.
2.label: proposed, not yet applied

3.description: Pilot-eligible only: systematic retrieval is plausible but coverage/quality unproven. Does NOT automatically admit to main analysis.
3.label: proposed, not yet applied

4.description: Good accessibility with documented API/portal and reproducible retrieval; must still pass all other Gates.
4.label: proposed, not yet applied

5.description: Excellent accessibility: authoritative, fully reproducible, machine-readable or reliably structured; must still pass all other Gates.
5.label: proposed, not yet applied
